coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] 下回合对目标施加2层[Binding] 
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] 使目标[VibrationExplosion]

[OnSucceedAttack] 使目标增加4级[Sinking] 强度
[OnSucceedAttack] 下回合对目标施加2层[Binding] 
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] 使目标[VibrationExplosion] 并对目标施加2层[Sinking]

[OnSucceedAttack] 使目标增加6级[Sinking] 强度
[OnSucceedAttack] 下回合对目标施加3层[Binding] 
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] 使目标[VibrationExplosion] 并对目标施加3层[Sinking]

2110411.name: 狩猎气息
2110411.desc:
拼点结束后，使自身增加2级[Breath] 强度
陷入混乱时获得2层[Protection] ，解除混乱时，使自身增加5级[Breath] 强度
